channel.title: Templates on Liuchien's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Templates on Liuchien's Blog

item.description:
<%* const title = await tp.system.prompt(“文章標題”); const slug = title .toLowerCase() .replace(/[^\w\s-]/g, “”) .replace(/\s+/g, “-”);

const tags = await tp.system.prompt(“標籤（用逗號分隔）”, “筆記”); const category = await tp.system.prompt(“分類”, “技術”); const desc = await tp.system.prompt(“SEO 描述”);
